name: d365-form-extractor
description: [BETA] Extract and compare Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Operations form configurations across environments using D365 ERP MCP or Playwright (Chrome DevTools Protocol). Authenticates via Azure CLI — no app registration required.

commands.title: D365 FO Config Compare: Extract Form
D365 FO Config Compare: Run Onboarding
D365 FO Config Compare: Start Chrome with Remote Debugging
D365 FO Config Compare: Clear Saved Settings
D365 FO Config Compare: Configure Form Paths
D365 FO Config Compare: Getting Started
D365 FO Config Compare: Create / Open Workspace Folder

d365FormExtractor.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python executable (3.10+). Leave as 'python' to use PATH.

d365FormExtractor.chromePath.description: Path to chrome.exe. Leave empty for auto-detect.

tenantId.description: Azure AD tenant ID (GUID) or domain for this environment. Used with 'az login --tenant'.

mcpUrl.description: Full MCP endpoint URL (e.g. https://org541b3d42.operations.dynamics.com/mcp). Leave empty to use <baseUrl>/mcp.

mcpAvailable.description: Set by onboarding: whether the /mcp endpoint is reachable and accepts the AAD token.

d365FormExtractor.formPaths.description: Configured form paths with validated menu items.

d365FormExtractor.outputFolder.description: Folder to write extraction Excel files. Defaults to <workspace>/d365-extracts.

d365FormExtractor.mcpAuth.description: Optional Azure AD app registration for MCP authentication (client credentials flow). The client secret is stored in VS Code SecretStorage, not here.

d365FormExtractor.defaultBackend.description: Extraction backend: D365 ERP MCP, Playwright (CDP), or ask each run.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with D365 FO Config Compare
walkthroughs.description: Set up your workspace and extract D365 F&O form configurations for cross-environment comparison.

steps.title: Create / open a workspace folder
steps.description:
Use C:\\D365-Form-Extractor (or pick your own). Output Excels and validated form paths are saved here.
[Open workspace folder](command:d365FormExtractor.scaffoldWorkspace)

steps.title: Run onboarding (Python deps + environments)
steps.description:
Installs Python packages, checks Azure CLI, registers your D365 environments.
[Run onboarding](command:d365FormExtractor.onboard)

steps.title: Launch Chrome with remote debugging
steps.description:
Starts Chrome on :9222. Sign in to D365 there.
[Start Chrome](command:d365FormExtractor.startChromeCdp)

steps.title: Configure form paths
steps.description:
Paste UI navigation paths; the extension discovers the menu item via Playwright.
[Configure form paths](command:d365FormExtractor.configureFormPaths)

steps.title: Extract a form
steps.description:
Pick a form and the environments to compare.
[Extract Form](command:d365FormExtractor.extract)
